headline: A Look At International Flavors & Fragrances (IFF) Valuation As Shares Rebound But Long Term Returns Lag
summary: Recent performance context for International Flavors & Fragrances (IFF) International Flavors & Fragrances (IFF) has recently drawn attention after a 4.4% daily gain, adding to a 3.5% rise over the past week, while the stock is down about 6.5% over the past month. See our latest analysis for International Flavors & Fragrances. Stepping back from the recent bounce, the stock’s 90-day share price return of 10.27% and year to date share price return of 11.39% contrast with a 1-year total...
